workflows.name: Anagram Scramble
workflows.description: Say !anagram and the bot picks a random word, scrambles its letters, and posts the jumble along with a hint for players to unscramble.
workflows.author: ircuitry

workflow.name: Anagram Scramble
workflow.description: Say !anagram and the bot picks a random word, scrambles its letters, and posts the jumble along with a hint for players to unscramble.
workflow.author: ircuitry

params.code: const words=[['melon','a juicy fruit'],['planet','orbits a star'],['guitar','a stringed instrument'],['castle','a royal stronghold'],['river','flowing water'],['dragon','a mythical beast'],['rocket','blasts into space'],['forest','full of trees'],['island','land in the sea'],['coffee','a morning drink']];const pick=words[Math.floor(Math.random()*words.length)];const word=pick[0];const hint=pick[1];let s=word.split('');for(let i=s.length-1;i>0;i--){const j=Math.floor(Math.random()*(i+1));[s[i],s[j]]=[s[j],s[i]];}let scrambled=s.join('');if(scrambled===word){scrambled=word.split('').reverse().join('');}print('\u{1F500} Unscramble this: '+scrambled.toUpperCase()+'  (hint: '+hint+')');

params.code:
const lines=(process.env.INPUT||'').split('\n').map(l=>l.trim()).filter(l=>l.length>0);
if(lines.length===0){console.log('No tips found in tips.txt yet.');}else{console.log('\uD83D\uDCA1 Tip of the day: '+lines[Math.floor(Math.random()*lines.length)]);}

print(q+'@@@'+a)

workflows.name: Werewolf
workflows.description: A social-deduction party game for your channel: villagers hunt the hidden wolves at night.
workflows.author: ircuitry

workflow.name: Werewolf
workflow.description: A social-deduction party game for your channel: villagers hunt the hidden wolves at night.
workflow.author: ircuitry

params.message: 🐺 Werewolf — !wolf join · !wolf start · !wolf myrole (PM me!) · !wolf reveal

params.code:
import os
lst=[x for x in os.environ.get('INPUT','').split(',') if x]
nick=os.environ.get('NICK','')
if nick in lst:
    print(','.join(lst)+'@@@'+nick+' is already in the village ('+str(len(lst))+' players).')
else:
    lst.append(nick)
    print(','.join(lst)+'@@@🏡 '+nick+' joins the village — '+str(len(lst))+' gathered. !wolf start when ready.')

import os,random
lst=[x for x in os.environ.get('INPUT','').split(',') if x]
if len(lst)<4:
    print('@@@🐺 Need at least 4 players ('+str(len(lst))+' so far). !wolf join')
    raise SystemExit
random.shuffle(lst)
roles=dict()
roles[lst[0]]='wolf'
roles[lst[1]]='seer'
for n in lst[2:]:
    roles[n]='villager'
assign=','.join(n+':'+r for n,r in roles.items())
v=sum(1 for r in roles.values() if r=='villager')
print(assign+'@@@🌙 Night falls over the village of '+str(len(lst))+'. Roles dealt in secret — PM me !wolf myrole. (1 werewolf, 1 seer, '+str(v)+' villagers)')

import os
d=dict(x.split(':') for x in os.environ.get('INPUT','').split(',') if ':' in x)
nick=os.environ.get('NICK','')
r=d.get(nick,'')
info=dict(wolf='🐺 You are the WEREWOLF. Each night, secretly choose a victim. Blend in by day!', seer='🔮 You are the SEER. Each night you learn whether one player is a wolf.', villager='🧑 You are a VILLAGER. Find the wolf by day and vote to lynch them.')
if not r:
    print('You are not in this game, '+nick+'. !wolf join then !wolf start.')
else:
    print(info.get(r,'Your role: '+r))

import os
d=[x for x in os.environ.get('INPUT','').split(',') if ':' in x]
if not d:
    print('No game in progress. !wolf start to deal roles.')
else:
    out=[]
    for x in d:
        n,r=x.split(':')
        tag=dict(wolf='🐺 wolf', seer='🔮 seer', villager='🧑 villager').get(r,r)
        out.append(n+' = '+tag)
    print('🔦 Roles revealed — '+' · '.join(out))

params.options:
Would you rather be able to fly or be invisible?
Would you rather have unlimited money or unlimited free time?
Would you rather always be 10 minutes late or always be 20 minutes early?
Would you rather speak every language fluently or play every instrument perfectly?
Would you rather live without music or live without movies?
Would you rather have the ability to teleport or read minds?
Would you rather never use the internet again or never watch TV again?
Would you rather fight one horse-sized duck or a hundred duck-sized horses?
Would you rather always know when someone is lying or always get away with lying?
Would you rather have more time or more money?
